data.body: AC1 LIVE VERIFICATION (lockdown.yml merged to main via change 451): opened test PR navapbc/rebar#117 (non-dependabot actor) → bot auto-CLOSED it in ~60s with the warm redirect comment (read-only mirror / nothing wrong with your change / Gerrit + your-first-change.md links / patch fallback), thread left OPEN (not locked). Reopened #117 → bot RE-CLOSED in ~45s with a 2nd comment (covers the 'reopened' trigger type). Test branch deleted. AC1 satisfied end-to-end.
